steps.title: Backsolving using point (0,1)
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (3x+2):
Plugging $x = 0$ gives $3(0)+2 = 2$, which does not equal the table value $1$.
Fails. Testing choice C (4x+1):
Plugging $x = 0$ gives $4(0)+1 = 1$, which matches the table value.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
